_comment: CPG brand directory for programmatic SEO. Each entry generates /brand/<slug>. Categories must match keys in content/categories.json. Domains are the canonical brand site without www or trailing slash. Add brands here, regenerate by deploying — no code changes needed.

brands.name: Casper
brands.blurb: Direct-to-consumer mattress brand that helped pioneer the bed-in-a-box category.

brands.name: Purple
brands.blurb: Hyper-elastic polymer mattresses known for the grid technology and cooling profile.

brands.name: Saatva
brands.blurb: Premium online mattress brand focused on luxury innerspring construction.

brands.name: Tuft & Needle
brands.blurb: Budget-friendly DTC mattress brand acquired by Serta Simmons.

brands.name: Leesa
brands.blurb: Online mattress brand with a social impact program donating mattresses to shelters.

brands.name: Glossier
brands.blurb: DTC beauty brand built out of Into the Gloss with a cult millennial following.

brands.name: The Ordinary
brands.blurb: Ingredient-led affordable skincare brand from Deciem with viral active formulations.

brands.name: Drunk Elephant
brands.blurb: Clean clinical skincare brand known for the suspicious six ingredient exclusion list.

brands.name: Rare Beauty
brands.blurb: Selena Gomez's makeup brand with a heavy focus on inclusive shade range.

brands.name: Ilia Beauty
brands.blurb: Clean beauty brand known for tinted serums and skin-first makeup formulations.

brands.name: The Farmer's Dog
brands.blurb: DTC fresh dog food subscription delivered in pre-portioned meal packs.

brands.name: Ollie
brands.blurb: Fresh dog food subscription competing with The Farmer's Dog on personalized recipes.

brands.name: Chewy
brands.blurb: Online pet products retailer with autoship subscriptions and a notable customer service reputation.

brands.name: KONG
brands.blurb: Iconic dog toy brand known for the rubber Classic and treat-stuffable designs.

brands.name: Open Farm
brands.blurb: Premium humanely-raised pet food brand with a transparent supply chain.

brands.name: Oreo
brands.blurb: America's best-selling cookie brand owned by Mondelez International.

brands.name: Lay's
brands.blurb: Frito-Lay's flagship potato chip brand with the largest chip portfolio in the US.

brands.name: Sugarfina
brands.blurb: Boutique candy company known for cocktail-themed gummies and curated tasting sets.

brands.name: RXBAR
brands.blurb: Whole-food protein bar brand acquired by Kellogg with the no-bs ingredient labeling.

brands.name: KIND
brands.blurb: Healthy snack bar brand built on a foundation of whole nuts and minimal processing.

brands.name: Liquid Death
brands.blurb: Tallboy canned mountain water brand with a punk-rock marketing identity.

brands.name: Olipop
brands.blurb: Functional prebiotic soda brand using classic flavors with a gut-health angle.

brands.name: Poppi
brands.blurb: Apple-cider-vinegar-based prebiotic soda brand acquired by PepsiCo.

brands.name: Athletic Brewing
brands.blurb: Non-alcoholic craft beer brand leading the NA category in the US.

brands.name: Death Wish Coffee
brands.blurb: Self-described world's strongest coffee brand sold direct and on Amazon.

brands.name: Method
brands.blurb: Plant-based household cleaning products with a design-forward bottle aesthetic.

brands.name: Mrs. Meyer's
brands.blurb: Garden-inspired cleaning products owned by SC Johnson, sold widely in grocery.

brands.name: Blueland
brands.blurb: Refillable cleaning tablets brand reducing single-use plastic in the home.

brands.name: Seventh Generation
brands.blurb: Plant-based cleaning and paper products with a Unilever parent and a strong sustainability story.

brands.name: Branch Basics
brands.blurb: One concentrate, dilute-to-clean brand championing simplified non-toxic cleaning.

brands.name: Native
brands.blurb: Aluminum-free deodorant brand acquired by Procter & Gamble with strong scent variety.

brands.name: Dove
brands.blurb: Unilever's flagship personal care brand built around the Real Beauty positioning.

brands.name: Dr. Bronner's
brands.blurb: Family-owned organic castile soap brand with its iconic dense label copy.

brands.name: Hims
brands.blurb: Men's wellness DTC brand covering hair loss, skin, sexual health, and mental health.

brands.name: Billie
brands.blurb: Women's razor and body care DTC brand acquired by Edgewell.

brands.name: Allbirds
brands.blurb: Sustainable shoe brand built on merino wool runners and recycled materials.

brands.name: Rothy's
brands.blurb: DTC shoe and bag brand known for washable knit flats made from recycled plastic.

brands.name: Vuori
brands.blurb: Performance lifestyle apparel brand with a coastal California aesthetic.

brands.name: Lululemon
brands.blurb: Athletic apparel brand that defined the premium yoga and athleisure category.

brands.name: Outdoor Voices
brands.blurb: Recreation-first activewear brand known for Doing Things and the tech-shorts pivot.

brands.name: Our Place
brands.blurb: DTC cookware brand built around the Always Pan multi-tasker.

brands.name: Great Jones
brands.blurb: Cheerful enameled cast-iron and ceramic cookware brand with a strong design voice.

brands.name: Made In
brands.blurb: Professional-grade cookware brand selling chef-quality pans directly to home cooks.

brands.name: Caraway
brands.blurb: Non-toxic ceramic-coated cookware brand with a color-coordinated home aesthetic.

brands.name: Le Creuset
brands.blurb: French enameled cast-iron heritage cookware brand founded in 1925.

brands.name: Olaplex
brands.blurb: Bond-building hair treatment brand built around the patented bis-aminopropyl diglycol dimaleate.

brands.name: Function of Beauty
brands.blurb: Customizable shampoo and conditioner brand with a per-customer formulation quiz.

brands.name: K18
brands.blurb: Biotech hair repair brand built around a 4-minute leave-in molecular treatment.

brands.name: Briogeo
brands.blurb: Black-owned hair care brand with curl and scalp focus, acquired by Wella.

brands.name: OUAI
brands.blurb: Jen Atkin's accessible-luxury haircare brand acquired by Procter & Gamble.
